name: Bonava AB (publ)
summary: Bonava AB (publ) develops and sells residential units in Sweden, Germany, Finland, Denmark, Norway, St. Petersburg, Estonia, and Latvia. The company offers multi-family and single-family houses; and develops homes for consumers and investors, such as pension funds, alongside municipalities, and other stakeholders. As of December 31, 2020, it had 31,800 building rights. Bonava AB (publ) is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
